title: sonchus novae-zelandiae
intro: Sonchus novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand sow thistle or cabbage thistle, is a biennial or perennial plant native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. It is a member of the sunflower family and is characterized by its large, coarse leaves and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Sonchus novae-zelandiae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting immune system health, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule for its herbal benefits.
